creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Good day.

I forgot to mention that when the patch 4.0-to-4.2.patch is applied
with 'patch -p1', one should delete (old and zero-sized) patch files
files/patch-ospfctl_parser.c and files/patch-ospfctl_parser.h.  Or
use 'patch -p1 -E' to remove them automatically.
